title: Mastercard Card
description: A Mastercard payment card representing a physical or virtual card instrument issued to a cardholder. Covers prepaid, debit, credit, and commercial card products across Card Issuance, BIN Lookup, Benefit Eligibility, and tokenization services.

cardNumber.description: Primary Account Number (PAN) for the card. Must pass Luhn algorithm validation.

cardId.description: Unique system-generated identifier for the card within the Mastercard issuing platform.

cardPackId.description: Identifier for the card pack, used in card issuance and fulfillment.

cardProductCode.description: Three-character code identifying the specific card product (e.g., MSI for Mastercard Standard, MWE for World Elite, MWO for World).

planCode.description: Card plan code defining the card product configuration and features.

programCode.description: Program code for the card product within the issuing institution.

brand.description: Card brand within the Mastercard network.

tier.description: Card tier or level indicating the product benefits tier.

status.description: Current lifecycle status of the card.

issuedDate.description: Date the card was issued, in ISO 8601 date format.

expirationDate.description: Card expiration date in MMYY format.

embossedName.description: Name embossed or printed on the physical card.

numberless.description: Indicates whether the card number is printed on the physical card. True means the number is not printed.

instant.description: Indicates whether the card was issued as an instant card (immediately generated).

virtual.description: Indicates whether this is a virtual card with no physical plastic.

contactless.description: Indicates whether the card supports contactless (NFC/PayPass) transactions.

photoIndicator.description: Indicates whether a photo is required on the card.

deliveryMode.description: Mode of card delivery to the cardholder.

deliveryDate.description: Date the card was delivered or handed over to the client, in ISO 8601 format.

tokenNumber.description: MDES (Mastercard Digital Enablement Service) token representing this card for digital transactions.

binNumber.description: Bank Identification Number (BIN), the first 6-8 digits of the card number identifying the issuing institution.

issuerId.description: ICA (Interbank Card Association) number of the issuing institution.

issuerName.description: Name of the financial institution that issued the card.

issuerCountryCode.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code of the issuing institution.

corporateCode.description: Unique code of the corporate entity for commercial/corporate cards.

Cardholder.description: The individual to whom the card is issued.

vip.description: Indicates whether the cardholder is classified as a VIP client.

CardLimits.description: Transaction limits configured for the card.

perTransactionLimit.description: Maximum amount permitted per transaction, without decimals.

dailyLimit.description: Maximum total amount permitted per day, without decimals.

totalTransactionLimit.description: Maximum cumulative transaction limit for the card.

velocity.description: Maximum number of transactions allowed within a configured duration.

validity.description: Card validity duration in ISO 8601 duration format (e.g., P3M4DT12H30M5S). Maximum validity is 3 years.

line1.description: First line of the street address.

line2.description: Second line of the street address.
